scripts.check:site: node --check axon-pixel.js && node --check main.js && node --check contact/contact.js && node --check book/booking.js && node --check book/status.js && node --check grail/assets/grail-activation.js
scripts.check:booking-functions: for f in functions/_middleware.js functions/.well-known/*.js functions/mcp/*.js functions/api/_lib/*.js functions/api/book/*.js functions/api/contact/*.js functions/api/grail/*.js; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.test:booking: node --test tests/booking-hardening.test.mjs tests/transaction-safety.test.mjs tests/contact-submit.test.mjs tests/booking-checkout.test.mjs tests/grail-payment-webhook.test.mjs tests/grail-checkout-status.test.mjs tests/grail-activation-conversion.test.mjs tests/grail-tracking-activation.test.mjs
